keys.meta_description: Compliant invoicing, validation, and ledger posting with automation.
keys.hero_description: Validate, post, and control from one view.
keys.features_0_description: Issue, track, and collect with clear states.
keys.features_1_description: Tax IDs, rates, and audit trails.
keys.features_2_description: Approved events flow to books with controls.
keys.sections_0_body: Billing and accounting mismatches slow month-end.
keys.sections_1_body: AR, AP, and adjustments share verifiable states.
keys.sections_2_body: Tax checks and ledger hand-offs on schedule or event.
keys.sections_3_body: Fewer manual lines and explainable variances.
keys.faq_0_q: Does the platform support Singapore eInvoice (InvoiceNow)?
keys.faq_0_a: Yes. The eInvoice module is designed to comply with local electronic invoicing standards, including InvoiceNow, PEPPOL-aligned formats, and GST requirements.
keys.faq_1_q: How does eInvoice connect to the general ledger?
keys.faq_1_a: Approved invoices generate journal entries automatically. Revenue recognition and AR entries post with the invoice reference, eliminating manual re-entry.
keys.faq_2_q: Can we automate invoice follow-up for overdue accounts?
keys.faq_2_a: Yes. Scheduler can send configurable reminders at defined intervals after an invoice is issued. Escalation paths can be set for accounts over specific thresholds.
keys.faq_3_q: Can we start small and expand?
keys.faq_3_a: Yes. Turn on modules as you grow—HR, finance, analytics, and workflow blocks scale together.
keys.faq_4_a: Use the Pricing page for tiers; Enterprise adds SLA, scale, and governance options.
keys.faq_5_q: How do I get a demo?
keys.faq_5_a: Use Talk to sales or Book demo from the header—our team can align Automation and Scheduler to your process.
keys.faq_6_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
keys.faq_7_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
